title: Finish issue follow-ups 2045 2047 2048 2049

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Finish GitHub issues #2045, #2047, #2048, and #2049, then publish new PRs.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Do not weaken proof, task-switch, parent-closure, or Memory capture safety. Do not rely on arbitrary prose keyword matching. Keep #2046 closed and treat these as follow-up issues.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact branch split, helper names, budget ceilings, and whether to use stacked or independent PRs after the implementation shape is clear.
canonical_core.escalate_when: Any issue needs a broader redesign than its comment acceptance criteria, or proof cannot distinguish the fixed behavior from advisory text.
canonical_core.next_action: Implement the four issue fixes with focused fixtures, then publish reviewable PRs.
proof_expectations: AW implement proof selection for changed paths.
make test-workspace, make lint-workspace, tests/test_workspace_cli.py, make typecheck, runtime mirror consistency where runtime mirror helpers change.
completion_criteria: #2045: ordinary default output budgets or shape invariants are checked and budget state is visible in operational_compression/proof-equivalent output.
#2047: Memory baseline-only, relevant-note, and capture decision states are distinct and fixture-covered.
#2048: issue-matched active plan continuation does not emit generic active-plan task-switch pressure, while unrelated task-switch protection remains.
#2049: closeout_trust prefers fresh closeout-evidence for the just-closed plan or explains ineligibility, with stale archive evidence distinguished.
New PRs are created for the completed work with validation evidence.

non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

intent.constraints: Keep scope bounded to the promoted TODO item and its stated touched paths.

intent.escalation: Escalate when a better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.

touched: Fill in the concrete files before implementation starts.

stop_conditions.stop when: The work no longer matches the promoted item or its completion criteria.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A correct fix requires changing the requested outcome or ownership boundary.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Implementation needs files outside the filled execution bounds.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: The selected proof cannot demonstrate the completion criteria.

context_budget.live working set: This execplan, the promoted item, and the narrow files needed for the current implementation step.
context_budget.recoverable later: Repo background, historical reviews, and deferred backlog unless compact outputs point there.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run, proof_report, finished_run_review, and closeout_distillation before pausing.
context_budget.pre-work config pull: Use compact config/startup/summary outputs before opening raw planning or routing files.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: Route to the narrowest relevant memory only when the task needs durable repo knowledge.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Fill in execution bounds, touched paths, and validation before implementation starts.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Proof failure, scope drift, interruption, handoff, or closeout.

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Keep scope bounded to the promoted TODO item and its stated touched paths.

delegated_judgment.escalate when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.

post_decomposition_delegation.decision rule: After this slice is bounded, decide whether direct work, read-only exploration, implementation handoff, validation handoff, or stronger review improves quality or saves tokens safely.

validation_commands: uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py implement --changed src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_core.py src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_primitives.py src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_planning.py src/agentic_workspace/reporting_support.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_workspace_implement_cli.py tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/issues-2045-2047-2048-2049-followups.plan.json --task "Finish issues #2045 #2047 #2048 #2049 and create new pull requests" --format json
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py summary --target . --format json
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py report --target . --section runtime_mirror_consistency --format json
completion_criteria: Finish issues #2045, #2047, #2048, and #2049 and publish new PRs.

execution_run.what happened: Implemented the #2045, #2047, #2048, and #2049 issue-comment follow-ups with focused runtime behavior and regression tests.
execution_run.scope touched: workspace runtime/reporting helpers, focused CLI tests, and this planning record
execution_run.changed surfaces: #2045 operational_compression/default-output budget evidence; #2047 Memory baseline-only and capture outcomes; #2048 shared issue-ref task-switch continuation; #2049 retained closeout-evidence selection and source-class reporting
validations run: AW implement changed-path packet passed and dogfooded planning-backed after plural issue-ref fix
AW planning doctor passed with existing installed-payload freshness attention only
execution_run.result for continuation: publish the stacked PRs; no implementation continuation remains for these issues
execution_run.next step: Create stacked PRs for the completed issue fixes.

finished_run_review.config compliance: followed AGENTS start/implement route; doctor payload freshness attention is pre-existing and not claimed fresh

proof_report.validation proof: focused regression tests, make test-workspace, lint, AW summary/doctor, tests/test_workspace_cli.py, typecheck, runtime mirror consistency, and git diff --check passed
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: The focused tests cover each issue acceptance behavior, and the broad required proof set passed on 2026-07-07.

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: #2045, #2047, #2048, and #2049 completion criteria are each represented by code changes and focused tests; PR publication remains the final external step.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Issue follow-up implementations are complete and ready for stacked PRs.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: no new durable Memory note required; the #2048 plural issue-ref dogfooding finding was fixed directly in scope

durable_residue.learned constraint: Structured task-switch issue refs must normalize active lane ids like issues-2045 as well as issue-2045.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: The finding was fixed directly and covered by regression tests.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
closure_check.why this decision is honest: All four issue acceptance surfaces are implemented and validated; the remaining action is PR publication, not more implementation.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: focused tests, make test-workspace, lint, AW summary/doctor, tests/test_workspace_cli.py, typecheck, runtime mirror consistency, git diff --check
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reviewer finds an unaddressed issue comment acceptance criterion or validation fails on the PR stack.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, report AW smoothness/helpfulness gaps, better-way signals, unused-feature reflections, and places AW could help more. Route each concrete signal to exactly one owner class unless explicitly split, or mark no_signal_found after checking.
